assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Version Reference table shows v3 'IClientCredentialsTokenManagementService' to v4 'IClientCredentialsTokenManager'

assertions.assertion: Output uses ClientCredentialsClientName.Parse() for the client name argument instead of a raw string
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Version Reference shows v3 'string' to v4 'ClientCredentialsClientName (strongly typed)' and all v4 examples use .Parse()

assertions.assertion: Output checks tokenResult.Succeeded before calling .GetToken() instead of directly accessing .Value
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pitfall 5 and Manual Token Retrieval section show checking .Succeeded before .GetToken()

assertions.assertion: Output removes or notes that AddDistributedMemoryCache() is no longer required because v4 uses HybridCache automatically
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Core Principle 5 and Pattern 3 state 'v4 Uses HybridCache; v3 Uses IDistributedCache' and 'No explicit registration is required for the default in-memory tier'

assertions.assertion: Output uses strongly-typed property setters like ClientId.Parse(), ClientSecret.Parse(), and Scope.Parse()
